data.title: BlackRock ups BMNR holding by 165%, Ark Invest invests $4.2M, BMNR's stock rises 1.5%. Ownership now 9M shares, valued at $245.7M as of Dec 31, 2025, despite losses.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies (NYSE: BMNR) saw a 1.5% increase as BlackRock (NYSE: BLK) revealed a stake increase of 165.6%, along with Cathie Wood's Ark Invest purchasing $4.2 million worth of BMNR shares. BlackRock's 13F-HR filing showed ownership surged from 3.4 million shares to 9 million shares by December 31, 2025, valued at $245.7 million. Despite BitMine's significant unrealized losses from Ethereum's decline, BlackRock raised its stake. Ark Invest also acquired 212,314 shares across three ETFs on Thursday to boost crypto exposure as BMNR trades 36.7% lower in the last month. Additional details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Trump's clash with Powell raises concerns about White House influence on central bank.
data.description: The recent criticisms directed at Powell by the administration are raising concerns that the White House may be attempting to exert too much control over the central bank.

data.title: Perimeter Solutions prices $550 million offering of 6.250% senior secured notes due 2034, to close on Jan. 2, 2026.
data.description: Perimeter Solutions, Inc. announced that its subsidiary, Perimeter Holdings, LLC, priced an offering of $550 million aggregate principal amount of 6.250% senior secured notes due 2034. The Notes will bear interest at 6.250% per year, payable semi-annually, and will mature on January 15, 2034. They will be fully guaranteed on a senior secured basis by Perimeter Intermediate, LLC, and all existing or future restricted subsidiaries. The Notes will be secured by a first-priority security interest in all present and future assets of Perimeter Holdings and guarantors. The offering is expected to close on January 2, 2026.

data.title: Trump and Powell's skirmish will have lasting consequences beyond a single trading session.
data.description: The impact of the recent conflict between Trump and Powell is expected to have long-term effects beyond a singular trading day.

data.title: Wall Street's new regulator faces political challenge in managing prediction markets after just four weeks on the job.
data.description: In his fourth week as Wall Street's newest regulator, the official is facing a growing political challenge regarding prediction markets. The official is currently contemplating the appropriate course of action in relation to this issue.

data.title: VEON (Nasdaq: VEON) included in global equity indices, enhancing visibility for global institutional investors.
data.description: On December 10, 2025, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), a renowned global digital operator, revealed its addition to two significant international equity indices. This strategic development enhances the Company's exposure and attractiveness to worldwide institutional investors, solidifying its position in the market.

data.title: Bitcoin developers prepare for post-quantum upgrades as threat assessment varies among experts; ranging from years to decades.
data.description: Developers of Bitcoin are creating a foundation for upgrades to combat post-quantum threats, although experts disagree on whether the risk will materialize in a matter of years or decades.

data.title: Dow Jones futures face risks in volatile market; Apple, Google, Amazon, Nvidia highlighted. Ways to minimize risks.
data.description: Ways to mitigate risks in a volatile market include monitoring major tech companies like Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia. These companies are showcasing strong performance despite market challenges. The Dow Jones Futures are a focal point in this precarious market situation.

data.title: Tragic incident at Simandou project: Death of employee at Guinea mine, Rio Tinto CEO expresses condolences.
data.description: In London, Rio Tinto has announced the tragic death of a contractor employee at the SimFer mine in Nzérékoré, Guinea on February 14th. Rio Tinto's CEO Simon Trott expressed sorrow, extending sympathy to the bereaved family, friends, and coworkers of the deceased individual. The company is offering complete assistance and plans to collaborate with authorities and partners to address the incident. The incident marks a somber moment as the company reflects on the loss of one of its workers at the Guinea mine site.

data.title: APIC achieves $8.13 million in net income and records $1.31 billion in sales in 2025, facing challenges due to regional conflicts.
data.description: In 2025, the Arab Palestinian Investment Company (APIC) reported record revenues of USD 1.31 billion, a 16.84% increase from the previous year. EBITDA rose to USD 74.85 million, a 9.06% increase. Net income was USD 14.34 million excluding hyperinflation impact, but with the impact included, net profit decreased by 5.58%. Net profit attributed to shareholders increased by 1.35% to USD 8.13 million. Earnings per share declined by 13.9% to USD 0.05 due to an increase in outstanding shares from 125 million to 160 million. Total assets reached USD 992.4 million, up 17.5% from 2024, while net equity for shareholders rose by 21.5% to USD 229.3 million. The company faced challenges in 2025, including the Gaza war and Israeli attacks.

data.title: Bitcoin's price surge to over $69,000 led to a rollercoaster week in the market, with Gemini Space Station's stock rallying. Gold advocate Peter Schiff criticized Michael Saylor's Bitcoin plan. Pudgy Penguins celebrated Valentine's Day through NFTs.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market experienced a tumultuous week, with Bitcoin's price initially surging past $69,000 before dropping, prompting heightened activity from traders and investors. Concurrently, the realm of non-fungible tokens (NFTs) embraced a distinctive Valentine's Day commemoration. One notable development was the strong performance of Gemini Space Station stock, bolstered by Bitcoin's upward trajectory. With a substantial portion of its revenue linked to Bitcoin activities, Gemini Space Station is viewed as a strategic investment tied to the performance of the leading cryptocurrency. Furthermore, renowned gold proponent Peter Schiff publicly criticized Michael Saylor, the executive chairman of Strategy, over his Bitcoin refinancing strategy. For more in-depth coverage, visit a reputable financial news platform.

data.title: AI startup HUUCH completes foundation of AI full-body motion products and game content platform. Milestone reached in redefining interactive entertainment space.  #Startups #AI #Entertainment
data.description: On February 15, 2026, an AI startup named HUUCH revealed the successful development of its product and game content platform. This achievement represents a major advancement in the company's goal to revolutionize the interactive entertainment sector.

data.title: Right at Home celebrates 25,000+ caregivers nationwide during Professional Caregivers Week from Feb 15-21.
data.description: From February 15-21, more than 25,000 professional caregivers are being recognized by locally owned franchises nationwide. In OMAHA, Neb., Right at Home is honoring the dedication, compassion, and resilience of these caregivers during Professional Caregivers Week 2026.

data.title: French rocket successfully launches 32 Amazon satellites. Trump pauses tech security measures with China. Twilio beats revenue estimates.
data.description: The French president celebrated the successful deployment of 32 Amazon.com Leo satellites into orbit, competing against SpaceX's Starlink. Russia attempted to block WhatsApp to promote a state-owned surveillance app, owned by Meta Platforms. Trump administration paused tech measures targeting China, pushing for a compact on data centers. Twilio reported revenue of $1.37 billion, beating estimates, and Roku beat earnings expectations with $1.4 billion in revenue. Applied Materials exceeded estimates with $7.01 billion in revenue. Lyft fell short with $1.59 billion in revenue. HubSpot beat earnings at $846.75 million revenue. QuantumScape had a smaller loss than estimated. AppLovin surpassed analyst estimates with $1.66 billion in revenue. Tower Semiconductor exceeded estimates as margins surged. Netflix is in a bidding war for Warner Bros. Discovery. Full story available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Leishen Energy reported FY 2025 financial results: total revenues declined to USD $48.3M, net income attributable was USD $1.25M.
data.description: Leishen Energy Holding Co., Ltd reported its fiscal year 2025 financial results with total revenues decreasing from USD $63.5 million to USD $48.3 million due to economic downturn and market challenges. Gross profit fell from USD $16.0 million to USD $8.5 million due to revenue declines. Operating expenses increased to USD $10.2 million mainly from international market expansion costs. Despite this, net income remained positive at USD $1.25 million due to non-operating gains. Clean-energy equipment sales accounted for 45.7% of revenues, decreasing by $11,742,904 due to declining market demand. The Company continues to focus on expanding into overseas markets and domestic natural gas trading to drive long-term growth.

data.title: GLP-1 use reduces asthma exacerbation risk by 14.6% for overweight, 12.2% for obese, and 13.3% for morbidly obese patients.
data.description: The commencement of GLP-1 is connected to a decreased risk of asthma exacerbation among overweight patients by 14.6%, obese patients by 12.2%, and morbidly obese patients by 13.3%. This was found in a study conducted in Milwaukee on Feb 15, 2026. The use of Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1) showed a noteworthy impact on reducing the risk of asthma exacerbation.
